title: Runtime validation for 1039/45425: balanced curation + score-page dataset visibility
description:
## Summary
Run end-to-end runtime validation on scorecard `1039` / score `45425`.

## Purpose
Prove that balanced curation, persisted dataset stats, and score-page visibility work together.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Curated associated dataset is created with balancing metadata.
- Score page shows dataset inventory and label distribution for the new dataset.
- Evaluation run against associated dataset completes successfully.
- Kanbus comment records commands, IDs, and observed outcomes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting runtime validation on 1039/45425: balanced score dataset-curate then evaluate accuracy with --use-score-associated-dataset.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation findings on 1039/45425: (1) Balanced curation currently fails fast with `No valid classes found in champion score YAML` for score id 1e6560e9-47fd-4846-89e1-4d8a2ccb5168, confirming class-contract prerequisite is still unmet for this score version. (2) Unbalanced control run succeeded: `plexus score dataset-curate --no-balance --max-items 20 --days 180` produced dataset_id `9caa61b7-aa4e-4cef-b60a-43b98d1b689b` with distributions included in output payload. (3) Associated-dataset accuracy run started but CLI emits extremely high-volume logs in this environment; process was terminated to avoid session overflow. Follow-up should use task/evaluation record polling path or log-redirection wrapper for runtime validation.
